excerpt: A cyborg from the future protects a young boy crucial to humanity’s survival from a merciless robot made of liquid metal that can assume the form of anything it touches.
title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day

excerpt: As the Old West fades, newly appointed sheriff Pat Garrett hunts down his old friend, Billy the Kid.
title: Pat Garrett & Billy the Kid

excerpt: Eccentric grandfather Peter Cushing builds a time-travelling space ship that whisks him and his granddaughters to a planet caught in a war between the peaceful Thals and the merciless Daleks.
title: Dr. Who and the Daleks

excerpt: A series of loosely connected skits surround an extended parody of Bruce Lee’s Enter the Dragon.
title: The Kentucky Fried Movie

excerpt: British Intelligence recruits Shaolin martial-artist Bruce Lee to enter a tournament held on an international criminal’s remote island compound.
title: Enter the Dragon
